name: wcl-raid-audit
description: Guild-ready WoW TBC raid auditing plugin powered by Parseforge and Warcraft Logs.

interface.longDescription: Create Discord-ready raid leadership audits from Parseforge and Warcraft Logs, covering consumes, boss debuff uptime, Windfury, sappers, enchants, and green gems.
defaultPrompt: Turn this Parseforge URL into a leadership raid audit.
Audit this raid report for consumes, debuffs, and green gems.
Check Windfury, sappers, enchants, and boss debuff uptime.
